$comment: Reference layout for ONE orchestrator model (onnx-community/Qwen3-1.7B-ONNX, dtype q4f16) shown as an example. The full, ordered catalogue of models the picker exposes lives in src/orchestrator/models.ts (onnx-community Qwen3 family). scripts/fetch-model.mjs downloads every catalogue model into dist/extension/models/<org>/<repo>/<path>, verifies size + sha256 (when known), and writes the reproducible lock file scripts/model-lock.json (gitignored). LFS file sha256 values are the content sha256 exposed by the Hugging Face API (lfs.oid).
